youtube_player_vs_music_choice.rationale: Music request/provenance builds structured input and source provenance without mutating live audio routing. YouTube player smoke remains a follow-on behind real-content ducker, audio-safe proof, and no-private-leak evidence.

umbrella_action.reason: The first adapter wave is split into child packets with disjoint write scopes; the umbrella remains a blocked coordination anchor.

candidates.label: Captions
candidates.producer_freshness: caption bridge segment age <= 15s with redaction status
candidates.rights_consent_posture: operator_original or operator_controlled text; public_safe or aggregate_only after redaction
candidates.public_claim_policy: No public caption availability claim until egress, redaction, rights/privacy, provenance, and caption freshness all pass.
candidates.dry_run_explanation: Caption producer, redaction, or public egress evidence is stale or absent.
tests: schema fixture for fresh caption segment
stale caption producer downgrades to dry-run
private/redaction failure denies public claim
candidates.verification_artifact: caption adapter fixture plus contract test evidence
candidates.selection_rationale: High-value linguistic carrier with explicit public-event shape and bounded freshness.

candidates.label: Cuepoints and chapters
candidates.producer_freshness: programme boundary event freshness <= 30s for live cuepoint attempts; archive chapter evidence for replay
candidates.render_target: YouTube cuepoint attempt, deterministic VOD chapter fallback, archive/replay index
candidates.rights_consent_posture: operator_original programme state; public_safe boundary metadata only
candidates.public_claim_policy: Cuepoint live claims require active broadcast, egress, quota/rate posture, duplicate suppression, and chapter fallback.
candidates.health_signal: cuepoint adapter health with last attempt, fallback reason, and duplicate window
candidates.dry_run_explanation: Live cuepoint API, broadcast, quota, or event evidence is unavailable; chapter fallback only.
tests: programme boundary maps to cuepoint and chapter candidates
API rejection preserves chapter fallback
duplicate suppression blocks repeat cuepoint
candidates.verification_artifact: cuepoint/chapter event fixture with fallback reason
candidates.selection_rationale: Turns research/programme boundaries into replayable public evidence without depending on live API success.

candidates.label: Chat ambient / keyword
candidates.event_input: aggregate chat salience and keyword class counts
candidates.producer_freshness: aggregate chat window age <= 60s; no raw author rows retained
candidates.render_target: aggregate-only ward texture and dry-run research marker
candidates.rights_consent_posture: aggregate_only; no author persistence, raw handles, or per-viewer memory
candidates.public_claim_policy: Requires aggregate privacy and health evidence before any ambient chat posture claim; no individual viewer claims.
candidates.health_signal: chat aggregate health with source age, count, and privacy filter status
candidates.dry_run_explanation: Chat producer is absent, stale, or lacks aggregate-only privacy proof.
tests: raw author fields are rejected
aggregate-only fixture is dry-run safe
stale aggregate window blocks public lane claim
candidates.verification_artifact: chat aggregate fixture with no author persistence
candidates.selection_rationale: Adds social substrate diversity while preserving consent and privacy boundaries.

candidates.label: Overlay / research marker
candidates.event_input: condition.changed, programme.boundary, and research marker events
candidates.producer_freshness: overlay producer state age <= 10s; marker provenance token present
candidates.render_target: overlay zone state and research marker lane
candidates.rights_consent_posture: operator_original marker metadata; public_safe only after provenance and egress checks
candidates.public_claim_policy: Overlay can display only evidence-backed markers; no public research claim when marker provenance or render target is missing.
candidates.health_signal: overlay producer health plus marker provenance freshness
candidates.dry_run_explanation: Overlay producer, marker provenance, or render target evidence is missing.
tests: fresh marker maps to dry-run/public-eligible overlay row
missing provenance blocks public marker
stale overlay producer emits no-op explanation
candidates.verification_artifact: overlay marker fixture with render target and provenance refs
candidates.selection_rationale: Makes the stream visibly multi-spectacle and research-driven without inventing public truth.

candidates.label: Music request / provenance
candidates.event_input: structured music request impingement plus provenance manifest token
candidates.producer_freshness: request input freshness <= 30s and music provenance token current for the active listening window
candidates.render_target: private music control lane, provenance manifest, and listening programme evidence
candidates.rights_consent_posture: operator_private request control; provenance must classify any public/monetized music risk
candidates.public_claim_policy: Private control never implies public music availability; public/monetized music claims require provenance, audio safety, rights, and egress gates.
candidates.health_signal: music request route health plus active provenance manifest state
candidates.dry_run_explanation: Request route, provenance token, or music risk classification is missing.
tests: private request becomes structured impingement
missing provenance blocks public/monetized claims
dry-run route emits explicit no-op reason
candidates.verification_artifact: music request/provenance fixture with private-control and public-risk fields
candidates.selection_rationale: Chosen over YouTube player smoke because it creates provenance and request truth without touching live audio routing.

candidates.label: Local visual pool
candidates.event_input: visual asset row plus provenance manifest token
candidates.producer_freshness: asset manifest and rights/provenance token freshness
candidates.render_target: Reverie visual ground and egress manifest
candidates.rights_consent_posture: asset rights class required per row
candidates.public_claim_policy: Defer until rights/provenance row and egress manifest are complete.
candidates.dry_run_explanation: Asset provenance or rights label missing.
tests: asset without provenance stays dry-run
candidates.selection_rationale: Important but already anchored by provenance/visual-pool work; not first wave.

candidates.label: CBIP
candidates.producer_freshness: current music provenance plus CBIP signal age
candidates.rights_consent_posture: depends on music provenance and recognizability risk
candidates.public_claim_policy: Defer until music provenance substrate can classify public and monetization risk.
candidates.dry_run_explanation: Music provenance or signal metadata missing.
tests: CBIP without music provenance is blocked
candidates.selection_rationale: Useful after the selected music provenance adapter lands.

candidates.label: Re-Splay M8
candidates.rights_consent_posture: operator hardware source; capture policy required
candidates.public_claim_policy: No mounted or public lane claim until hardware smoke and capture policy exist.
candidates.dry_run_explanation: M8 hardware smoke has not landed.
tests: unavailable hardware emits director no-op

candidates.label: YouTube player smoke
candidates.event_input: real content player state plus ducking evidence
candidates.producer_freshness: player state and ducking/audio safety proof
candidates.public_claim_policy: Defer until real-content ducker smoke and no-private-leak audio evidence are complete.
candidates.dry_run_explanation: Player smoke or audio safety evidence missing.
tests: player unavailable does not imply public content
candidates.selection_rationale: Not selected because music provenance is lower risk and unlocks upstream evidence without live audio mutation.

candidates.label: Refusal publication
candidates.producer_freshness: publication artifact event and refusal footer policy freshness
candidates.render_target: publication bus, RSS/hash sidecar, and public event router
candidates.rights_consent_posture: operator_original refusal artifacts; public-safe redaction required
candidates.public_claim_policy: Defer until public-event artifact shape and per-surface refusal policy are complete.
candidates.dry_run_explanation: Publication event or per-surface refusal policy missing.
tests: refusal artifact stays dry-run without public-event proof
candidates.selection_rationale: Public fanout has value but should wait on event/fanout policy tasks.

candidates.label: Mobile substream
candidates.event_input: portrait stream producer and salience crop state
candidates.render_target: mobile portrait stream and companion page
candidates.public_claim_policy: Defer until portrait producer, smart crop, and legibility smoke exist.
candidates.dry_run_explanation: Portrait producer or legibility smoke missing.
tests: companion page unavailable until 9:16 producer exists
candidates.selection_rationale: Not first wave because producer is not proven.

candidates.label: Lore wards
candidates.rights_consent_posture: unknown until redaction and chat authority gates exist
candidates.public_claim_policy: No public/director availability claim while redaction and authority are missing.
candidates.dry_run_explanation: Lore ward producer and redaction policy unavailable.
tests: blocked lore ward allows only no-op explanation

candidates.label: Autonomous narrative
candidates.event_input: autonomous narration and quality feedback state
candidates.producer_freshness: speech, audio safety, egress, and quality feedback gates required
candidates.rights_consent_posture: operator_original speech only after private-voice containment and public-claim gates
candidates.public_claim_policy: No public speech lane claim until audio, egress, quality, and public-claim gates pass.
candidates.dry_run_explanation: Narration public gates are not complete.
tests: blocked narration cannot foreground public speech

candidates.label: LRR archive
candidates.producer_freshness: operator consent, retention, redaction, and storage decision required
candidates.rights_consent_posture: operator consent required before capture or archive claims
candidates.public_claim_policy: No archive/live claim until operator consent and retention/redaction policy exist.
tests: missing consent blocks archive capture

candidates.label: CDN assets
candidates.producer_freshness: asset publisher health and rights/provenance sidecar
candidates.public_claim_policy: Defer until CDN publisher recovery and asset provenance are complete.
candidates.dry_run_explanation: CDN asset publisher or rights/provenance sidecar missing.
tests: CDN asset without provenance stays dormant
candidates.selection_rationale: Useful as dependency work, but not first-wave adapter implementation.
